body:
## Summary
- rewrites q050-derived q377/q378 true/false stems as direct source-criticism propositions
- adds generated true/false naturalness guard coverage for the old source-criticism definition cleft
- regenerates content/question-bank.csv and site/questions.js

## Verification
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node --test --test-name-pattern "q050 source-criticism" scripts/derived-content.test.js`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node --test --test-name-pattern "source-criticism definition" tests/content-published-question-types.test.js`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-generated-true-false-naturalness`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run validate:content`
- `node scripts/export-question-bank.js --check && node scripts/export-site-question-bank.js --check && node --check site/questions.js`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check`
title: Fix generated source-criticism true/false stems
